ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(Status), TEXT(Status) = "A, B Enrollment", OR( NOT(Eligibility_reviewed__c), NOT(Employer_coverage_verified__c), NOT(SS_income_confirmed__c), NOT(SSA_account_verified__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: All eligibility review items must be completed before proceeding to A & B Enrollment.
